description: Style NoteWhen it comes to everyday accessories, we recommend this wallet from lino perros which is the ultimate blend of durability and style. A coloured binding along the edge of the wallet gives it a quirky edge while its multiple pouches and slots help you keep yourself organised.Product DetailsBlack wallet with thread detailing along circumferenceRed separator forming two main compartmentsOne red and two black card slots on left with slip pocketFlap on left with one red and two black card slotsOne red and two black card slots on right with slip pocket Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize12 cm x 9 cm
